---
title: "Farhan (Adin) Aditya R."
subtitle: "Economics · Policy · Data"
page-layout: full
toc: false
title-block-banner: false
body-classes: "page-index"
listing:
- id: research
  contents: webpages/projects/research/
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  max-items: 6
  image-height: 150px
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, categories]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
- id: analysis
  contents: webpages/projects/analysis/
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  max-items: 6
  image-height: 150px
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, categories]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
- id: blog
  contents: webpages/projects/blog/
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  max-items: 6
  image-height: 150px
  fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, categories]
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="search-bar-section">
  <div class="search-bar-inner">
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 16 16" class="search-icon">
      <path d="M11.742 10.344a6.5 6.5 0 1 0-1.397 1.398h-.001c.03.04.062.078.098.115l3.85 3.85a1 1 0 0 0 1.415-1.414l-3.85-3.85a1.007 1.007 0 0 0-.115-.099zm-5.242 1.656a5.5 5.5 0 1 1 0-11 5.5 5.5 0 0 1 0 11z"/>
    </svg>
    <input
      type="text"
      class="search-bar-input"
      placeholder="Search projects, analysis, blog posts..."
      onclick="
        var btn = document.querySelector('.aa-DetachedSearchButton, #quarto-search button, [data-bs-toggle=search]');
        if (btn) { btn.click(); } else {
          var e = new KeyboardEvent('keydown', {key: 'k', ctrlKey: true, bubbles: true});
          document.dispatchEvent(e);
        }
      "
      readonly
    />
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<section class="hero-section">
  <div class="content-block">
    <div class="hero-label">Economics · Policy · Data</div>
    <h1 class="hero-title">Farhan Aditya<br>Ramadhan</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Economics graduate from Universitas Indonesia specializing in macroeconomics and economic history, using causal inference and applied econometrics, with Stata, R, and Python.</p>
    <div class="hero-tags">
      <span class="tag">Historical Economics</span>
      <span class="tag">Applied Econometrics</span>
      <span class="tag">Macroeconomics</span>
      <span class="tag">Political Economy</span>
      <span class="tag">Development Economics</span>
      <span class="tag">Public Finance</span>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="about.qmd" class="btn-primary">About Me</a>
      <a href="files/CV/Farhan-Aditya-Ramadhan_CV.pdf" class="btn-secondary" target="_blank">View CV →</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

```{=html}
<div class="tools-strip">
  <div class="tools-strip-inner">
    <div class="tools-strip-items">
      <span class="tools-strip-item">Stata</span>
      <span class="tools-strip-item">R</span>
      <span class="tools-strip-item">Python</span>
      <span class="tools-strip-item">EViews</span>
      <span class="tools-strip-item">LaTeX</span>
      <span class="tools-strip-item">SQL</span>
      <span class="tools-strip-item">Quarto</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="home-group-header">
  <div class="home-group-header-inner">
    <span class="home-group-header-title">Projects</span>
    <a href="webpages/projects/projects.qmd">View all →</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="listing-header">
  <h2>Analysis</h2>
  <div class="listing-arrow-row">
    <button class="listing-arrow" onclick="scrollListing('analysis', -1)">&#8592;</button>
    <button class="listing-arrow" onclick="scrollListing('analysis', 1)">&#8594;</button>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="listing-section">
  <div class="listing-scroll-wrapper" id="wrapper-analysis">
```

:::{#analysis}
:::

```{=html}
  </div>
</div>
```

<a href="webpages/projects/analysis.qmd" class="listing-more">More →</a>

---

```{=html}
<div class="listing-header">
  <h2>Research</h2>
  <div class="listing-arrow-row">
    <button class="listing-arrow" onclick="scrollListing('research', -1)">&#8592;</button>
    <button class="listing-arrow" onclick="scrollListing('research', 1)">&#8594;</button>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="listing-section">
  <div class="listing-scroll-wrapper" id="wrapper-research">
```

:::{#research}
:::

```{=html}
  </div>
</div>
```

<a href="webpages/projects/research.qmd" class="listing-more">More →</a>

---

```{=html}
<div class="listing-header">
  <h2>Blog</h2>
  <div class="listing-arrow-row">
    <button class="listing-arrow" onclick="scrollListing('blog', -1)">&#8592;</button>
    <button class="listing-arrow" onclick="scrollListing('blog', 1)">&#8594;</button>
  </div>
</div>
<div class="listing-section">
  <div class="listing-scroll-wrapper" id="wrapper-blog">
```

:::{#blog}
:::

```{=html}
  </div>
</div>
```

<a href="webpages/projects/blog.qmd" class="listing-more">More →</a>

```{=html}
<div class="resources-section">
  <div class="resources-section-inner">
    <div class="resources-header">
      <span class="resources-header-title">Resources</span>
    <a href="webpages/resources/resources.qmd">View all →</a>
    </div>
    <div class="resources-grid">
      <a class="resource-card" href="webpages/resources/rstudio.qmd">
        <div class="resource-card-icon"><i class="fa-brands fa-r-project"></i></div>
        <div class="resource-card-title">R &amp; RStudio</div>
        <div class="resource-card-desc">Books, tutorials, and notes for learning R, ggplot2, tidyverse, and Quarto.</div>
      </a>
      <a class="resource-card" href="webpages/resources/stata.qmd">
        <div class="resource-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-table"></i></div>
        <div class="resource-card-title">Stata</div>
        <div class="resource-card-desc">Guides and do-file notes for data management, econometric estimation, and microdata analysis.</div>
      </a>
      <a class="resource-card" href="webpages/resources/macro.qmd">
        <div class="resource-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i></div>
        <div class="resource-card-title">Macroeconomics</div>
        <div class="resource-card-desc">Notes and resources on macroeconomic theory, time-series modelling, and policy analysis.</div>
      </a>
      <a class="resource-card" href="webpages/resources/econometrics.qmd">
        <div class="resource-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-calculator"></i></div>
        <div class="resource-card-title">Econometrics</div>
        <div class="resource-card-desc">Applied econometrics resources covering OLS, panel data, IV, ARDL, and structural estimation.</div>
      </a>
      <a class="resource-card" href="webpages/resources/causalinference.qmd">
        <div class="resource-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i></div>
        <div class="resource-card-title">Causal Inference</div>
        <div class="resource-card-desc">Resources on DiD, RD, IV, matching, and impact evaluation methods.</div>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
<script>
var positions = { analysis: 0, research: 0, blog: 0 };

function forceCarousel(id) {
  var wrapper = document.getElementById('wrapper-' + id);
  if (!wrapper) return;
  var grid = wrapper.querySelector('.list.grid');
  if (!grid) return;

  var availWidth = wrapper.parentElement.offsetWidth || wrapper.offsetWidth;
  var gap = 24;
  var minCardWidth = 340;

  // start at 3, drop down until cards actually fit
  var cols = 3;
  while (cols > 1) {
    var testWidth = cols * minCardWidth + (cols - 1) * gap;
    if (testWidth <= availWidth) break;
    cols--;
  }

  var cardWidth = 340;
  var wrapperWidth = cols * cardWidth + (cols - 1) * gap + 2;

  wrapper.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  wrapper.style.width = wrapperWidth + 'px';
  wrapper.style.maxWidth = wrapperWidth + 'px';

  grid.style.display = 'flex';
  grid.style.flexWrap = 'nowrap';
  grid.style.flexDirection = 'row';
  grid.style.width = 'max-content';
  grid.style.transition = 'transform 0.4s ease';
  grid.style.gap = gap + 'px';

  var items = wrapper.querySelectorAll('.g-col-1');
  items.forEach(function(col) {
    col.style.width = cardWidth + 'px';
    col.style.minWidth = cardWidth + 'px';
    col.style.maxWidth = cardWidth + 'px';
    col.style.flexShrink = '0';
  });

  wrapper._visibleCols = cols;
}

function scrollListing(id, dir) {
  var wrapper = document.getElementById('wrapper-' + id);
  if (!wrapper) return;
  var grid = wrapper.querySelector('.list.grid');
  if (!grid) return;
  var gap = 24;
  var cardWidth = parseInt(wrapper.querySelectorAll('.g-col-1')[0].style.width);
  var colWidth = cardWidth + gap;
  var cols = wrapper.querySelectorAll('.g-col-1').length;
  var visible = wrapper._visibleCols || 3;
  var max = Math.max(0, cols - visible);
  positions[id] = Math.min(max, Math.max(0, positions[id] + dir));
  grid.style.transform = 'translateX(-' + (positions[id] * (colWidth - 1)) + 'px)';
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  ['analysis','research','blog'].forEach(forceCarousel);
  setTimeout(function() { ['analysis','research','blog'].forEach(forceCarousel); }, 300);
  setTimeout(function() { ['analysis','research','blog'].forEach(forceCarousel); }, 800);
});

window.addEventListener('resize', function() {
  positions = { analysis: 0, research: 0, blog: 0 };
  ['analysis','research','blog'].forEach(function(id) {
    var wrapper = document.getElementById('wrapper-' + id);
    var grid = wrapper ? wrapper.querySelector('.list.grid') : null;
    if (grid) grid.style.opacity = '0';
  });
  setTimeout(function() {
    ['analysis','research','blog'].forEach(function(id) {
      var wrapper = document.getElementById('wrapper-' + id);
      if (wrapper) {
        wrapper.style.width = '100%';
        wrapper.style.maxWidth = '100%';
      }
    });
    ['analysis','research','blog'].forEach(forceCarousel);
    ['analysis','research','blog'].forEach(function(id) {
      var wrapper = document.getElementById('wrapper-' + id);
      var grid = wrapper ? wrapper.querySelector('.list.grid') : null;
      if (grid) grid.style.opacity = '1';
    });
  }, 200);
});
</script>
```
